mapper.insert: insert into employee_profiles ( employee_id, company_id, user_id, employee_code, employee_name, employee_email, employee_phone, job_title, manager_user_id, department_id, start_date, work_location, status, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{employeeId}, #{companyId}, #{userId}, #{employeeCode}, #{employeeName}, #{employeeEmail}, #{employeePhone}, #{jobTitle}, #{managerUserId}, #{departmentId}, #{startDate}, #{workLocation}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX( CASE WHEN employee_code ~ '^\[.+\]\d+$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(employee_code FROM '(\d+)$') AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END ), 0) + 1 FROM employee_profiles WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
